title: Ethical Bytes marketing website with core pages, services, and contact form

requirements.text: Create a multi-page company website named “Ethical Bytes” with top-level navigation and routes for: Home, About, Services, Pricing, and Contact Us.

quotes: create a service based company website named ethical bytes the website contains home page about pricing page and services page and contact us page

acceptanceCriteria: A header navigation is present on all pages with links to Home, About, Services, Pricing, Contact Us.
Each navigation link routes to the correct page without a full page reload.
Each page includes an H1 title matching the page name and content relevant to that page.
A footer is present on all pages with the company name “Ethical Bytes” and basic links.

requirements.text: Populate the Services page with service sections for: Website Development ("website making"), Website Design, and Graphic Design, and optionally add additional relevant services that fit a digital studio (e.g., branding, UI/UX, SEO basics) without changing the core three requested services.

quotes: the service provide is website making website design graphic design and as you want to add it

acceptanceCriteria: Services page includes clear cards/sections for Website Development, Website Design, and Graphic Design.
Each service includes a short description and a small list of included deliverables.
Any additional services (if added) are clearly separated and do not replace/remove the three requested services.

requirements.text: Create a Pricing page with at least three pricing tiers (e.g., Starter, Professional, Enterprise) that map sensibly to the listed services, with clear included features and a primary call-to-action linking to the Contact Us page.
acceptanceCriteria: Pricing page shows at least three tiers with a price (or “Starting at …”) and a feature list.
Each tier has a CTA button that routes to Contact Us.
Copy is in English and is consistent with the Ethical Bytes brand name.

requirements.text: Create an About page describing Ethical Bytes as a service-based company with a short mission/values section emphasizing ethical, transparent work, and a brief “How we work” section.

quotes: home page about pricing page and services page and contact us page

acceptanceCriteria: About page includes a mission/values section and a simple process section (e.g., Discovery → Design → Build → Launch).
All user-facing text is in English.
Page layout is responsive for mobile and desktop.

requirements.text: Implement a Contact Us page with a form (name, email, company/optional, service interest dropdown, message) and submit the inquiry to the backend for storage; show success and error states in the UI.
acceptanceCriteria: Contact form includes: name, email, service interest, message (company optional).
On submit, the UI shows a loading state, then a success confirmation when saved.
If submission fails, the UI shows an error message and does not lose the user’s typed content.
Submitted inquiries are persisted in the Motoko canister and remain available after refresh.

requirements.text: Add backend support for storing contact inquiries with timestamps, and provide a query method to list inquiries (intended for internal use; no public admin UI required).
acceptanceCriteria: Backend defines a stable data structure to store inquiries (name, email, service interest, message, optional company, createdAt).
Backend exposes an update method to create an inquiry and a query method to list inquiries.
Creating an inquiry returns a clear success result (or throws a controlled error) that the frontend can handle.

requirements.text: Apply a coherent, creative visual theme for the Ethical Bytes brand (colors, typography, spacing, and component styling) and use it consistently across all pages; avoid blue/purple as the primary palette.
acceptanceCriteria: All pages share consistent typography, button styles, spacing, and section layout.
Primary color palette is not dominated by blue or purple.
Design remains accessible with sufficient contrast for text and interactive elements.

requirements.text: Generate and include static brand imagery in the app (stored under frontend/public/assets/generated) and use them on the Home page and/or header/footer.
acceptanceCriteria: Generated images exist in frontend/public/assets/generated and are referenced directly by the frontend (not served via backend).
Home page includes at least one hero/brand image, and the site includes a logo mark or wordmark in the header.
Images render crisply on desktop and mobile (proper sizing and aspect ratio).

constraints: Use English for all user-facing text.
Backend must remain a single Motoko actor in backend/main.mo (no additional backend services).
Do not edit files under frontend/src/components/ui or other immutable paths; compose UI using existing components instead.
Do not add third-party auth providers or external email/SMS integrations for contact form submission.
nonGoals: Building a full CMS/admin dashboard for managing inquiries or site content.
Implementing real-time chat, push notifications, or email delivery for contact inquiries.
Adding e-commerce, payments, or subscription billing flows.

required: Minimal modern wordmark logo reading “Ethical Bytes” (ethical-bytes-logo.dim_512x256.png)
Abstract ethical-tech hero illustration with geometric circuit motifs, neutral palette with a warm accent (ethical-bytes-hero.dim_1600x900.png)
Set of 3 simple line icons representing web development, web design, and graphic design (ethical-bytes-service-icons.dim_512x512.png)

goalsToAdd: Build a service-based company website for Ethical Bytes with Home, About, Services, Pricing, and Contact pages.
preferencesToAdd: Use English for user-facing site copy.
